name: Solscan
description: The most widely used Solana block explorer. Clean UI for transactions, accounts, tokens, and NFTs.

name: Solana Explorer
description: The official Solana block explorer maintained by Solana Labs.

name: Birdeye
description: DeFi analytics and trading platform. Token charts, wallet analytics, and portfolio tracking.

name: Step Finance
description: Solana portfolio management dashboard. Visualize your positions, transactions, and LP holdings.

name: Dune Analytics (Solana)
description: Write custom SQL queries against indexed Solana data. Community dashboards for any protocol.

name: Flipside Crypto
description: On-chain analytics platform with Solana data. SQL-based queries and community dashboards.

name: Orca Whirlpool Analytics
description: Real-time analytics for Orca's Whirlpool concentrated liquidity pools.
